name: Cottage Cheese Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg.
2. Add the cottage cheese and mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in the milk.
4. Sift in the dry ingredients.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls into hot oil in a skillet at 375°F.
6. Fry until brown on both sides, about 4 to 5 minutes.
7. Drain on absorbent paper.
Makes 10 fritters.
